channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya Activists Demand Parliamentary Inquiry into Security Agency Alleged Rights Abuses
item.description: Human rights campaigners in Kenya are pushing for the formation of a joint parliamentary committee to investigate alleged human rights violations by security agencies. The proposal, which was part of ...

item.title: Argentina Overcomes Two-goal Deficit to Beat Egypt 3-2 in World Cup Clash
item.description: In a thrilling World Cup last-16 match, Argentina staged a remarkable late comeback to defeat Egypt 3-2. The defending champions faced a two-goal deficit but turned the tide with goals from Lionel Mes...

item.title: Legal proceedings continue in foreigners' abduction and sexual assault case with suspects' remand extended
item.description: A judicial magistrate in Lahore has extended the physical remand of four suspects involved in an alleged abduction and sexual assault case involving two foreign women by another five days. The suspect...

item.title: Daily Horoscopes for July 8, 2026: Insights for Each Zodiac Sign
item.description: The article provides daily horoscope predictions for each zodiac sign on July 8, 2026. ARIES is advised to acknowledge mistakes and move forward, while TAURUS should focus on a creative project. GEMIN...

item.title: Zanzibar's Political Parties Agree to Reconciliation Accord
item.description: Zanzibar is set to mark a significant political milestone as President Dr. Hussein Mwinyi prepares to oversee the signing of a reconciliation agreement between the ruling Chama Cha Mapinduzi (CCM) and...

item.title: Man Accused in Baruipur Minor's Rape-Murder Killed in Alleged Gunfight with Police
item.description: In West Bengal's Baruipur, a man accused in the rape and murder of an 11-year-old girl was killed during an alleged gunfight with police. Prabhash Mondal, one of three arrested, attempted to snatch a ...

item.title: VAR Controversies in 2026 FIFA World Cup Match Spark Debate Over Fair Play
item.description: Former Bafana Bafana striker Benni McCarthy and fellow legend Quinton Fortune have publicly criticized the inconsistent application of VAR (Video Assistant Referee) decisions during the Egypt vs Argen...

item.title: Marcos Appoints Former Candidates to Key Government Posts After 2025 Election
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has appointed several losing candidates from the 2025 national elections to new government posts following the expiration of a one-year ban on such appointments. The 198...

item.title: Navigating Australia-India tensions amid strategic cooperation and human rights concerns
item.description: The Australia-India partnership faces ongoing challenges as both nations balance strategic collaboration with deepening political and ethical disagreements. While the two democracies emphasize shared ...

item.title: ILO Policy Brief Highlights GenAI Exposure and Preparedness Gaps in ASEAN Labor Markets
item.description: The International Labour Organization (ILO) released a policy brief analyzing the impact of generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) on nearly 80 million workers in the Association of Southeast Asia...

item.title: Community Resistance Against Far-Right Extremism in Epping
item.description: The article details the escalating tensions in Epping, a small English town, where far-right extremism and community activism intersect. A series of protests erupted after a local man, Kebatu, was acc...

item.title: Julius Malema denies orchestrating removal of former intelligence chief amid corruption allegations
item.description: EFF leader Julius Malema has denied allegations that he orchestrated the removal of former intelligence inspector-general Setlhomamaru Dintwe in 2021, during a disciplinary hearing involving Maj-Gen F...

item.title: Soccer Player Returns Home Unharmed Amid Police Investigation into Possible Staged Kidnapping
item.description: A 27-year-old professional soccer player is at the center of a police investigation after his family reported him missing, only for him to return home unharmed seven days later. Mpumalanga police conf...

item.title: Generational Divide in Interest and Knowledge of Indigenous Histories Among Australians
item.description: A study conducted by the War Studies Research Group surveyed 1,503 Australians aged 18+ to assess public attitudes towards Australian history, with a focus on Indigenous histories. While younger Austr...

item.title: Man found deceased after being reported missing in Winnipeg
item.description: A man who was reported missing in Winnipeg has been located deceased by police authorities. The incident, which occurred on July 7, 2026, involved a thorough search effort by the Mounties, Manitoba's ...

item.title: Balancing Local Aviation Goals with Global Financing in Nigeria
item.description: Nigeria's aviation sector faces a tough balancing act between boosting local participation and maintaining access to global financing. The Fly Nigeria Bill aims to redirect government travel spending ...

item.title: Shiv Sena Corporator Ramesh Mhatre Denies Assault on Female Doctors at Hospital
item.description: Shiv Sena corporator Ramesh Mhatre has denied allegations of assaulting female doctors at Shashtri Nagar Hospital, stating he did not raise his hand against them. The incident, captured in a viral vid...

item.title: Female Students Confront Man Found in Ladies' Hostel at Kenyan University
item.description: Female students at a Kenyan university confronted and attacked a man they caught inside their hostel after he allegedly tried to lock their roommate in a room. The incident, captured on video, shows t...

item.title: Ventura Teen Charged with Felonies After Fleeing Police on Freeway
item.description: A 17-year-old resident of Ventura, California, has been charged with two felony counts after allegedly fleeing police officers by riding an electric motorcycle the wrong way on a highway. According to...

item.title: Cargo Plane Lost Over Arabian Sea; Search and Rescue Operations Intensified
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has directed the Civil Aviation Authority (CAA), Pakistan Navy, and Pakistan Air Force (PAF) to intensify search and rescue operations in the Arabian Sea following the di...
